reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Antes de cualquier llamada a LLM: verificar allow_external flag. Si false → usar Ollama local.
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Before any LLM call: check allow_external flag. If false → use local Ollama.

reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Verificar RLS PostgreSQL antes de exponer cualquier endpoint de datos
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Verify PostgreSQL RLS before exposing any data endpoint

reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Validar firma HMAC de WhatsApp en cada webhook entrante (evitar replay attacks)
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Validate WhatsApp HMAC signature on every inbound webhook (prevent replay attacks)

reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Sanitizar y normalizar todos los datos de scraping antes de insertar en BD
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Sanitize and normalize all scraped data before DB insert

reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Circuit breaker en RPA: pausar automáticamente si 3 fallos consecutivos en scraping
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Circuit breaker in RPA: auto-pause if 3 consecutive scraping failures

reinforced_checks.trigger_es: Chunking con overlap en RAG: evitar pérdida de contexto en límites de fragmento
reinforced_checks.trigger_en: Chunking with overlap in RAG: prevent context loss at fragment boundaries
